title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Domino's India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Domino's India
jsonLd.description:
Domino's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Domino's India:
Domino's India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India!
